releaseNotes:
• The player top bar now shows the stream resolution and codec next to the channel name (for example ESPN HD (1080p H.264)) once the first frame arrives. The previous separate label could be pushed off-screen and often did not appear.
• Backup and restore now keeps all settings. The multi-view decode mode, the control-bar hide delay, and the video zoom mode were previously reset to defaults when restoring a backup.
